original_text:
### Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine → 75% Gold | `#faa31b` → Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
- Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
- Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

relations.note: Selects a specific approved gradient for the masthead/logo-mark use case.
Direction rule governs orientation of the masthead gradient.

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves
Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves
Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds
Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds
Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Preserve brand consistency by restricting gradients to the sanctioned set.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set may be used — never invent gradients. The approved background gradients are: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds and waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; and Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds. Gradients are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark; approved values only.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**

rules.intent: Ensure the logo mark reads with sufficient contrast against the masthead gradient.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) is the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; the mark sits at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Maintain consistent gradient orientation across masthead and banner uses.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications, gradients run horizontally (left → right), transitioning from the dark/saturated end to the light end as shown.
